response.overview: Tere Baad Bhi is an emotional romantic drama that tells the story of two lovers whose bond remains alive even after separation, heartbreak, and silence. Set against a visually poetic world of rain, rivers, city lights, and fading memories, the film explores how some relationships never truly end — they continue to live within the heart forever.  The story follows a young man struggling to move on from the love that once gave meaning to his life. Haunted by memories and emotional scars, he unexpectedly reconnects with the woman who changed him forever. As destiny brings them face to face again, old feelings return, forcing them to confront the pain, sacrifices, and unfinished emotions they left behind.  Filled with intense romance, soulful moments, emotional conflicts, and cinematic visuals, Tere Baad Bhi is a heartfelt journey about love that survives even after goodbye.
response.tagline: “Love ended for the world… but not for them.”
response.title: Tere Baad Bhi
